remarks: ALL UTILITIES INCLUDED! Discover the perfect blend of comfort and convenience in this newly renovated 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom apartment located in the sought-after Harbor Point neighborhood of Stamford. This spacious and modern unit offers a luxurious living experience with high-end finishes throughout, including sleek hardwood flooring, recessed lighting, large windows that flood the space with natural light, and the convenience of in-unit laundry. The area also offers excellent transportation options, with easy access to major highways and public transit, making it ideal for commuting to nearby cities or into New York City. This is an ideal choice for those seeking a modern and hassle-free living experience.
